text.title: AC Mapping Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of ac-mapping.yaml (or the equivalent table in the PR description).

field.name: orphan_tests
field.notes: tests in the diff not mapped to any AC

forbidden.pattern: orphan_acs non-empty (any AC without at least one mapped test)
asserted_behavior contains a token from the structural-only list (was_called, no_exception, status_200_alone, line_reached)
assertion_class missing OR set to a value not in the closed list
mapping added in a separate commit after PR review feedback (timestamp of yaml later than first review request)
test referenced in mapping does not exist in the diff or in main
asserted_behavior shorter than 6 words (label, not a behavior description)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Merge two assertions on the same AC into one entry when they test contiguous behavior (creation + persistence).
Auto-populate the initial mapping from the linked story using extract-acs.py; engineer fills the asserted_behavior fields.
When the test file path moves during refactor, the mapping file is updated in the same PR.

list.item: Every AC has at least one mapped test
No orphan tests in the diff
Each asserted_behavior describes a state, output, side-effect, or negative assertion
Mapping committed at PR open, not retrofitted after review
Reviewer walked the map and confirmed each line
